column1: # Supplement: polyphonic compound corrections that pypinyin gets wrong.
# These entries are merged with bopomofo.tsv at load time.
# Maintained manually вҖ” add entries where pypinyin assigns the wrong tone to зӮә etc.
# зӮә (г„Ёг„ҹЛҠ wГ©i) вҖ” "to be / to become / to act as"
# pypinyin always returns г„Ёг„ҹЛӢ for all зӮә compounds; correct ones listed here.
